_comment: MCP server fragment merged into the project's .mcp.json by BundleInstaller. Pre-registers the Thinkube Kanban MCP server so Claude Code discovers its tools without manual config. The extension also registers this server in-process via vscode.lm.registerMcpServerDefinitionProvider — this .mcp.json entry is the fallback for Claude Code sessions running outside the VS Code MCP discovery path.
